notes: 1k linear pot wired as a 2-terminal rheostat (wiper strapped to one end); dial at 0.0 = min resistance (brightest), 1.0 = max resistance (dimmest)
description: A smaller-range variable resistor than the 10k — a 10x span instead of 500x, so the whole dial does something useful for a single LED dimmer instead of cramming the visible brightness range into the first few percent of travel.
